healthy_description: Tiny needle-like green leaves on woody stems. Strong aromatic smell. Pink, purple, or white flower spikes.

symptom_guide.symptom: Plant wilting and turning brown from base
symptom_guide.visual_description: Discoloration starts at soil line and moves upward, stems become mushy

symptom_guide.symptom: White powdery coating on leaves and stems
symptom_guide.visual_description: Fine white fungal powder on foliage, new growth heavily affected
Brown or black lesions scattered on foliage surface

symptom_guide.symptom: Pale yellow stippling on leaves with fine webs
symptom_guide.visual_description: Leaves appear washed out, tiny mites visible with magnification
